title: Leamas Gate Summary v2
description: Wire schema for the Leamas Gate Summary v2 format with bounded scope and parent lifecycle state.

schema_version.description: Integer discriminator that identifies the v2 wire format. The lexical form is enforced by the pre-schema envelope scanner.

generated_at.description: Non-empty RFC 3339 timestamp with explicit UTC offset emitted by the producer.

scope_id.description: Stable identifier for the bounded verification scope.

scope_status.description: Lifecycle status of the bounded verification scope. Wire form is uppercase only.

parent_act.description: Parent ACT identifier. Empty string for root scopes.

parent_status.description: Lifecycle status of the containing parent process or activity. Independent from scope_status and overall_status.

overall_status.description: Aggregate gate status. Independent from scope_status and parent_status; the wire form does not derive one from the others.

execution_head_oid.description: Git object ID for the execution head commit (40 or 64 lowercase hex characters).

execution_tree_oid.description: Git tree object ID for the executed tree (40 or 64 lowercase hex characters).

subject_tree_oid.description: Git tree object ID for the subject under test (40 or 64 lowercase hex characters).

worktree_clean_before.description: Whether the worktree was clean before the verification began.

worktree_clean_after.description: Whether the worktree was clean after the verification finished.

checks.description: Ordered list of recorded checks. Producers record parent-state observations as ordinary checks with scope=parent_act.

oid_hex.description: Lowercase hex Git object ID (64 characters).

exit_code_or_null.description: Arbitrary-precision integer exit code, or JSON null when no exit code is recorded.

argv.description: Command-line arguments of the executed process.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration in milliseconds. Arbitrary-precision non-negative integer.

stdout_sha256.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hex of the producer's exact stdout byte stream. The empty-stream hash is e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855.

stderr_sha256.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hex of the producer's exact stderr byte stream. The empty-stream hash is e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855.

name.description: Stable identifier for the check as emitted by the producer.

scope.description: Scope reference for the check. Use 'ROOT' for root-scope checks or the parent ACT identifier for parent-state observations.

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence pointer for the check.

detail.description: Human-readable detail comment for the check.

total.description: Total test count for the check. Optional; if present, all five counters must be present together.

pass_count.description: Passing test count for the check. Optional; if present, all five counters must be present together.

fail_count.description: Failing test count for the check. Optional; if present, all five counters must be present together.

skip_count.description: Skipped test count for the check. Optional; if present, all five counters must be present together.

unavailable_count.description: Unavailable test count for the check. Optional; if present, all five counters must be present together.

anyOf.description: All five test-count fields must be present together.
Or none of them may be present.
